title: After the Japan Cup: Dreams Come True

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(There might be tons of Umamusume out there
who are stronger than me...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And there might be tons of Umamusume whose
running is even more eye-catching than mine...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I know that nobody's more passionate about running than I am! Because...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I love running! I really love it! I love it more than the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And a Japanese runner has seized victory here in
this international battle! It's Ines Fujin! A flawless
win!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Ahaha! C'mon everyone, you're going
overboard here... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone, did your dreams come true
today? As for me...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I feel like all my dreams just came true at once!
